name: Irish Hot Pot
recipeIngredient: 6 medium Potatoes peeled and sliced thin
1 package (20 oz) sausage links or ground chuck (amounts you like)
1 can (15 oz) condensed tomato soup diluted with water
Salt and white pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a buttered, 4-quart casserole, layer the potatoes, onions, and carrots.
Season each layer with salt and pepper as you go.
2. Sprinkle rice over the layers, then add peas with their liquid.
3. Top with sausage links or ground chuck.
4. Pour the diluted soup over everything.
5. Bake, covered, in a 375°F oven for 1 hour.
6. Remove the cover and bake uncovered for an additional hour.
